code: class Emitter { constructor(){this.ev={};} on(e,fn){(this.ev[e]=this.ev[e]||[]).push(fn);} off(e,fn){this.ev[e]=(this.ev[e]||[]).filter(f=>f!==fn);} emit(e){(this.ev[e]||[]).forEach(fn=>fn());} } const em=new Emitter(); const f1=()=>console.log("f1"); const f2=()=>console.log("f2"); em.on("x",f1); em.on("x",f2); em.off("x",f1); em.emit("x");
